pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Increase the maximum number of retry attempts for the Gemini API call to handle transient overloads.
Add logging to track successful API responses during the retry loop.
Refactor error handling to extract status code into a local variable for cleaner logging and checks.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.before: log.error("Gemini API returned HTTP {} on attempt {}: {}", wcre.getStatusCode().value(), attempt, wcre.getMessage());
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.after:
int statusCode = wcre.getStatusCode().value();
                    log.error("Gemini API returned HTTP {} on attempt {}: {}", statusCode, attempt, wcre.getMessage());

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Change 403 Forbidden handling to throw a RuntimeException instead of returning null when devFallback is disabled.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.before:
log.warn("Received 403 Forbidden from Gemini API; devFallback disabled — not returning mock.");
                            return null;
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.after:
log.error("Received 403 Forbidden from Gemini API; devFallback disabled — rejecting request.");
                            throw new RuntimeException("Gemini API authentication failed (403). Please check API key configuration.");

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Implement specific exponential backoff logic for 503 Service Unavailable errors.
Change generic HTTP error handling to throw a RuntimeException instead of returning null after max attempts.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.before:
log.error("Gemini API returned HTTP {} on final attempt: {}", wcre.getStatusCode().value(), wcre.getMessage(), wcre);
-                        return null;
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.after:
log.error("Gemini API returned HTTP {} on final attempt", statusCode);
+                        throw new RuntimeException(String.format("Gemini API error (%d) after %d attempts", statusCode, maxAttempts));

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Increase the base backoff time for generic HTTP errors from 300ms to 500ms.
Change transport error handling to throw a RuntimeException instead of returning null after max attempts.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.after: throw new RuntimeException("Failed to connect to Gemini API after " + maxAttempts + " attempts", we);

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Increase the base backoff time for transport errors from 300ms to 500ms.
Change null response body handling to throw a RuntimeException instead of returning null.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.after: throw new RuntimeException("Failed to get response from Gemini API after " + maxAttempts + " attempts");
